summary: HC-05 Bluetooth SPP module via UART. Supports master/slave mode, transparent serial data transmission to phone or PC.
notes: HC-05 operates at 3.3V logic level, compatible with STM32 directly.
Enter AT mode: hold KEY button while powering on, LED blinks slowly.
Pair with phone via Bluetooth SPP app, default PIN 1234.

app_logic_snippets.api_summary: HC05_Init(baud) HC05_Send(data,len) HC05_Printf(fmt,...) HC05_Read(buf,max) HC05_DataAvailable() HC05_SendAT(cmd,resp,timeout)
app_logic_snippets.notes: HC-05 is transparent UART bridge. Data sent to UART appears on Bluetooth SPP. Use HC05_SendAT() only in AT mode (KEY pin HIGH).
